description: Grid-style directory audit utility providing recursive directory discovery and size reporting.
safety: Read-only. Does not modify files or directories. Safe for execution in any shell environment.

usage.instruction: Specify a target directory. Use '.' to audit the current working directory.

source_code:
#!/bin/bash
if [[ "$1" == "-h" || -z "$1" ]]; then
    echo -e "\e[1;34mUsage:\e[0m daudit <directory>"
    echo -e "\e[1;33mExplaining:\e[0m Grid-style directory audit showing name + size in MB."
    exit 0
fi

read -p "Enter max depth (Press Enter for Infinity): " depth
DEPTH_CMD=""
[[ ! -z "$depth" ]] && DEPTH_CMD="-maxdepth $depth"

echo -e "\e[1;32m📁 Auditing: $1\e[0m"

find "$1" $DEPTH_CMD -type d | while read dir; do
    size=$(du -sh "$dir")
    name=$(basename "$dir")
    echo -e "└── 📂 \e[1;34m${size}\e[0m"
done
